# Use this for known-fake test fixtures, example values in docs, etc.
# One entry per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
# Matching is substring: if this string appears anywhere in the detected value, it's suppressed.

# These entries suppress our own test fixtures so we can test the allowlist feature
